suites.name: live
suites.note: Skipped: ios.GetDevice fails on both paired devices (Minicades iPhone, Jevons iPad mini) — `Device 'UDID' not found` despite ios.ListDevices enumerating them. Environmental upstream go-ios quirk requiring device unplug+replug; not introduced by this release's code. Manager unit tests in internal/logcapture/ (8 cases) and the oslog parser round-trip tests (11 cases including 9/10/16-byte regression cases) cover this release's surface.
